items.name: Astralis
items.description:
Forged through the eons from crystallized stardust, this legendary blade emerged as gravitational forces meticulously shaped it from celestial essence. Imbued with a flawless equilibrium befitting its extraordinary density, the blade emanates a glowing violet and purple gradient that shimmers in the celestial light. Those who grasp its hilt become vessels of the mighty forces that govern the vast expanse of space...

Created by VOEW; This sword uses PBR materials and dynamically changes based on the lighting of the experience your in!
